title: Fallow JSON Output Schemas
description: Schemas for the JSON output of fallow commands. Bare `fallow --format json` produces a combined envelope with `check`, `dupes`, and `health` keys. Individual commands (`fallow dead-code --format json`, `fallow health --format json`, `fallow dupes --format json`, `fallow audit --format json`) produce their own top-level structure.

CombinedOutput.title: fallow --format json (bare, combined)
CombinedOutput.description: Combined output from bare `fallow` invocation. Contains results from all enabled analyses (check, dupes, health). Use --only/--skip to select.

check.description: Dead code analysis results (omitted if --skip check)

AuditOutput.title: fallow audit --format json
AuditOutput.description: Audit output combining dead code, complexity, and duplication scoped to changed files. Returns a verdict (pass/warn/fail) with per-category summary and full sub-results.

verdict.description: pass = no issues, warn = warn-severity only (exit 0), fail = error-severity issues (exit 1)

changed_files_count.description: Number of files changed between base ref and HEAD

base_ref.description: Git ref used as comparison base (explicit or auto-detected)

head_sha.description: Short SHA of HEAD (omitted if git unavailable)

dead_code.description: Full dead code results (omitted if no changed files)

duplication.description: Full duplication results (omitted if no changed files)

complexity.description: Full complexity results (omitted if no changed files)

total_issues.description: Total number of issues found across all categories.

entry_points.description: Entry point detection summary. Always present in check output.

summary.description: Per-category issue counts. Always present. When --summary is used, individual issue arrays are omitted.

baseline_deltas.description: Per-category delta comparison against a baseline. Only present when --baseline is used.

regression.description: Regression check result. Only present when --fail-on-regression is used.

CheckGroupedOutput.title: fallow dead-code --group-by <owner|directory|package> --format json
CheckGroupedOutput.description: Grouped dead code output produced when --group-by is active. Issues are partitioned into groups (by CODEOWNERS team, directory prefix, or workspace package) instead of flat arrays.

grouped_by.description: The grouping strategy used. 'owner' groups by CODEOWNERS team, 'directory' groups by top-level directory prefix, 'package' groups by workspace package name.

total_issues.description: Total number of issues across all groups.

groups.description: One entry per group, each containing the same issue arrays as the ungrouped CheckOutput.

CheckGroupedEntry.description: A single group within grouped dead code output. Contains the group key, a per-group total, and the same issue arrays as CheckOutput.

key.description: Group identifier. For 'owner' grouping: the CODEOWNERS team (e.g., '@team-name'). For 'directory' grouping: the top-level directory prefix (e.g., 'src/components').

total_issues.description: Total number of issues in this group.

findings.description: Functions exceeding complexity thresholds, sorted by the --sort criteria.

file_scores.description: Per-file health scores. Only present when --file-scores is used. Sorted by maintainability_index ascending (worst first). Zero-function files (barrels) are excluded by default.

hotspots.description: Hotspot entries combining git churn with complexity. Only present when --hotspots is used. Sorted by score descending (highest risk first).

hotspot_summary.description: Hotspot analysis summary. Only present when --hotspots is used.

vital_signs.description: Project-wide vital signs metrics. Always present when computed.

health_score.description: Project-level health score (0-100) with letter grade. Only present when --score is used.

targets.description: Ranked refactoring recommendations. Only present when --targets is used. Sorted by efficiency (priority/effort) descending.

target_thresholds.description: Adaptive percentile-based thresholds used for target scoring. Only present when --targets is used.

health_trend.description: Trend comparison against a previous snapshot. Only present when --trend is used.

coverage_gaps.description: Static test coverage gaps. Only present when --coverage-gaps is used.

DupesOutput.title: fallow dupes --format json
DupesOutput.description: Duplication analysis output. Contains clone groups (individual duplicates), clone families (groups sharing the same files), and aggregate statistics.

clone_groups.description: All detected clone groups. Each group contains 2+ instances of identical or near-identical code.

clone_families.description: Clone families: groups of clone groups sharing the same file set, indicating systematic duplication patterns.

mirrored_directories.description: Directory pairs with high structural duplication. Only present when mirrored directories are detected.

SchemaVersion.description: Schema version for this output format (independent of tool version). Adding new fields does not bump the version. Consumers should check this field to detect structural changes.

ToolVersion.description: Fallow tool version that produced this output.

files_analyzed.description: Number of files analyzed for complexity.

functions_above_threshold.description: Number of functions exceeding at least one threshold (before --top truncation).

files_scored.description: Number of files with health scores. Only present when --file-scores is used. 0 indicates the flag was set but scoring failed.

average_maintainability.description: Average maintainability index across all scored files (before --top truncation). Only present when --file-scores is used and at least one file was scored.

name.description: Function name, or "<anonymous>" for unnamed functions/arrows.

line_count.description: Number of lines in the function body.

actions.description: Suggested actions to address this complex function.

FileHealthScore.description: Per-file health score. Formula: MI = 100 - (complexity_density × 30) - (dead_code_ratio × 20) - min(ln(fan_out+1) × 4, 15), clamped to [0, 100]. Type-only exports excluded from dead_code_ratio.

fan_in.description: Number of files that import this file.

fan_out.description: Number of files this file directly imports.

dead_code_ratio.description: Fraction of value exports (excluding type-only) with zero references (0.0–1.0).

complexity_density.description: Total cyclomatic complexity / lines of code.

maintainability_index.description: Weighted composite score (0–100, higher is better).

total_cyclomatic.description: Sum of cyclomatic complexity across all functions in this file.

total_cognitive.description: Sum of cognitive complexity across all functions in this file.

function_count.description: Number of functions in this file.

lines.description: Total lines of code in the file.

HotspotEntry.description: A hotspot: a file that is both complex and frequently changing. Score = normalized_churn × normalized_complexity × 100 (0–100, higher = riskier).

score.description: Hotspot score (0–100). Higher means more risk.

commits.description: Number of commits touching this file in the analysis window.

weighted_commits.description: Recency-weighted commit count (exponential decay, half-life 90 days).

lines_added.description: Total lines added across all commits in the window.

lines_deleted.description: Total lines deleted across all commits in the window.

complexity_density.description: Total cyclomatic complexity / lines of code.

fan_in.description: Number of files that import this file (blast radius).

trend.description: Churn trend: accelerating (recent > 1.5× older), stable, or cooling (recent < 0.67× older).

actions.description: Suggested actions to reduce hotspot risk.

files_analyzed.description: Number of files with churn data meeting the threshold.

shallow_clone.description: Whether the repository is a shallow clone.

priority.description: Weighted priority score (0-100). Higher = more urgent.

efficiency.description: priority / effort_numeric (Low=1, Medium=2, High=3). Default sort order.

confidence.description: Data source reliability. High = deterministic analysis, Medium = heuristic, Low = git-dependent.

factors.description: Contributing factors that triggered this recommendation. Empty array omitted from JSON.

evidence.description: Structured evidence for supported categories. Omitted when not applicable.

complex_functions.description: Complex functions with line numbers (for extract_complex_functions).

cycle_path.description: Files in the import cycle (for break_circular_dependency).

actions.description: Suggested actions for this refactoring target.

TargetThresholds.description: Adaptive percentile-based thresholds derived from the project's metric distribution. Used for priority scoring and rule matching.

fan_in_p95.description: Fan-in saturation for priority formula (p95, floor 5).

fan_in_p75.description: Fan-in moderate threshold for contributing factors (p75, floor 3).

fan_out_p95.description: Fan-out saturation for priority formula (p95, floor 8).

fan_out_p90.description: Fan-out high threshold for rules and factors (p90, floor 5).

HealthTrend.description: Trend comparison between the current run and a previous snapshot. Shows per-metric deltas with directional indicators.

git_sha.description: Git SHA at time of snapshot.

score.description: Health score from the snapshot (stored, not re-derived).

snapshots_loaded.description: Number of snapshots found in the snapshot directory.

TrendCount.description: Raw numerator/denominator for a percentage metric in trend comparison.

CoverageGaps.description: Static test coverage gaps derived from the module graph. Shows runtime files and exports with no test dependency path.

files.description: Runtime files with no test dependency path. Omitted when empty.

exports.description: Runtime exports with no test-reachable reference chain. Omitted when empty.

CoverageGapSummary.description: Aggregate coverage-gap counters for the current analysis scope.

covered_files.description: Runtime-reachable files also reachable from tests.

file_coverage_pct.description: Percentage of runtime files that are test-reachable.

untested_files.description: Runtime files with no test dependency path.

untested_exports.description: Runtime exports with no test-reachable reference chain.

UntestedFile.description: A runtime file with no test dependency path.

value_export_count.description: Number of value exports declared by the file.

UntestedExport.description: A runtime export that no test-reachable module references.

HealthScore.description: Project-level health score. Score = 100 minus penalties from dead code, complexity, maintainability, hotspots, unused deps, and circular deps. Use --score to force full pipeline for maximum accuracy.

score.description: Overall score (0-100, higher is better). Reproducible: 100 - sum(penalties) == score.

grade.description: Letter grade. A: score >= 85, B: 70-84, C: 55-69, D: 40-54, F: below 40.

HealthScorePenalties.description: Per-component penalty breakdown. Each field shows points subtracted. None/absent means the metric was not available (pipeline didn't run). Sum of all penalties = 100 - score.

dead_files.description: Points lost from dead files (max 15). Null if dead code pipeline not run.

dead_exports.description: Points lost from dead exports (max 15). Null if dead code pipeline not run.

complexity.description: Points lost from average cyclomatic complexity above 1.5 (max 20).

p90_complexity.description: Points lost from p90 cyclomatic complexity above 10 (max 10).

maintainability.description: Points lost from low maintainability index (max 15). Null if file-scores not computed.

hotspots.description: Points lost from hotspot density (max 10). Null if hotspots not computed.

unused_deps.description: Points lost from unused dependencies (max 10). Null if dead code pipeline not run.

circular_deps.description: Points lost from circular dependencies (max 10). Null if dead code pipeline not run.

VitalSigns.description: Project-wide vital signs metrics. Optional fields are null when the corresponding analysis was not run.

duplication_pct.description: Code duplication percentage. Null if duplication pipeline was not run.

hotspot_count.description: Files with hotspot score >= 50. Null if git history unavailable.

counts.description: Raw counts behind the vital signs percentages. Always present when vital_signs is present.

Action.description: A suggested action for resolving an issue. Each issue includes an array of possible actions: a fix action (auto-fixable or manual), suppress-line, suppress-file, and/or add-to-config.

type.description: Kebab-case identifier for the fix action.

auto_fixable.description: Whether `fallow fix` can apply this fix automatically.

note.description: Optional context note. Present on non-auto-fixable actions, and on auto-fixable re-export findings to warn about public API surface.

comment.description: The inline comment to place above the line (e.g., '// fallow-ignore-next-line unused-export').

scope.description: Present on multi-location issue types (e.g., duplicate_exports) to indicate the comment must be applied at each location.

comment.description: The file-level comment to place at the top of the file (e.g., '// fallow-ignore-file unused-file').

description.description: Human-readable description of the config change.

config_key.description: The fallow config key to add the value to (e.g., 'ignoreDependencies').

value.description: The value to add to the config key (e.g., 'lodash').

HealthFindingAction.description: A suggested action for a complex function finding.

auto_fixable.description: Whether fallow can auto-fix this action.

comment.description: The inline comment to insert (e.g., '// fallow-ignore-next-line complexity'). Present for suppress-line actions.

placement.description: Where to insert the suppress comment (e.g., 'above-function-declaration'). Present for suppress-line actions.

HotspotAction.description: A suggested action for a hotspot file.

auto_fixable.description: Whether fallow can auto-fix this action.

RefactoringTargetAction.description: A suggested action for a refactoring target.

auto_fixable.description: Whether fallow can auto-fix this action.

category.description: The recommendation category for apply-refactoring actions.

comment.description: The inline comment to insert. Present for suppress-line actions when evidence exists.

placement.description: Where to insert the suppress comment. Present for suppress-line actions.

CloneFamilyAction.description: A suggested action for a clone family.

auto_fixable.description: Whether fallow can auto-fix this action.

comment.description: The inline comment to insert (e.g., '// fallow-ignore-next-line code-duplication'). Present for suppress-line actions.

CloneGroupAction.description: A suggested action for a clone group.

auto_fixable.description: Whether fallow can auto-fix this action.

comment.description: The inline comment to insert (e.g., '// fallow-ignore-next-line code-duplication'). Present for suppress-line actions.

path.description: File path (forward slashes, relative to project root).

actions.description: Suggested actions to resolve this issue.

path.description: File path containing the unused export.

is_type_only.description: Whether this is a type-only export (interface, type alias).

span_start.description: Byte offset into the source file (used by the fix command).

is_re_export.description: Whether this finding comes from a barrel/index re-export rather than the source definition.

actions.description: Suggested actions to resolve this issue.

location.description: Which section of package.json the dependency is listed in.

path.description: Path to the package.json where this dependency is listed.

line.description: 1-based line number of the dependency entry in package.json.

actions.description: Suggested actions to resolve this issue.

path.description: File path containing the unused member.

parent_name.description: Name of the parent enum or class.

actions.description: Suggested actions to resolve this issue.

path.description: File path containing the unresolved import.

specifier.description: The import specifier that could not be resolved.

actions.description: Suggested actions to resolve this issue.

package_name.description: npm package name that is imported but not listed in package.json.

imported_from.description: Import sites where this unlisted dependency is used.

actions.description: Suggested actions to resolve this issue.

export_name.description: The export name that appears in multiple modules.

locations.description: Locations where this export name is defined.

actions.description: Suggested actions to resolve this issue.

package_name.description: Production dependency that is only used via type-only imports.

path.description: Path to the package.json where this dependency is listed.

line.description: 1-based line number of the dependency entry in package.json.

actions.description: Suggested actions to resolve this issue.

package_name.description: Production dependency that is only imported by test files — consider moving to devDependencies.

path.description: Path to the package.json where this dependency is listed.

line.description: 1-based line number of the dependency entry in package.json.

actions.description: Suggested actions to resolve this issue.

files.description: File paths forming the import cycle, in cycle order.

length.description: Number of files in the cycle.

line.description: 1-based line number of the import that starts the cycle.

col.description: 0-based byte column offset of the import that starts the cycle.

is_cross_package.description: Whether this cycle crosses workspace package boundaries. Only present when true.

actions.description: Suggested actions to resolve this issue.

from_path.description: Relative path to the file making the disallowed import.

to_path.description: Relative path to the file being imported.

from_zone.description: Architecture zone of the importing file.

to_zone.description: Architecture zone of the imported file.

import_specifier.description: Relative path of the imported file (used as specifier).

line.description: 1-based line number of the import statement.

col.description: 0-based byte column offset of the import statement.

actions.description: Suggested actions to resolve this issue.

CloneGroup.description: A group of code clones — the same (or normalized-equivalent) code appearing in multiple places.

instances.description: All instances where this duplicated code appears.

token_count.description: Number of normalized source tokens in the duplicated block.

line_count.description: Number of source lines in the duplicated block.

actions.description: Suggested actions to eliminate this clone group.

CloneInstance.description: A single instance of duplicated code at a specific location.

CloneFamily.description: A clone family: a set of clone groups sharing the same file set, indicating systematic duplication.

groups.description: Clone groups belonging to this family.

total_duplicated_lines.description: Total duplicated lines across all groups in this family.

total_duplicated_tokens.description: Total duplicated tokens across all groups in this family.

actions.description: Suggested actions to eliminate duplication in this family.

kind.description: What kind of refactoring is suggested.

estimated_savings.description: Estimated lines that could be eliminated.

DuplicationStats.description: Aggregate duplication statistics for the analyzed project.

files_with_clones.description: Files containing at least one clone instance.

total_lines.description: Total lines across all analyzed files.

duplicated_lines.description: Lines that are part of at least one clone.

total_tokens.description: Total tokens across all analyzed files.

duplicated_tokens.description: Tokens that are part of at least one clone.

clone_instances.description: Total clone instances across all groups.

RegressionResult.description: Result of regression detection (--fail-on-regression). Compares current issue counts against a baseline from config or an explicit file.

EntryPoints.description: Entry point detection summary showing total detected entry points and their sources.

total.description: Total number of detected entry points.

sources.description: Breakdown of entry points by detection source (e.g., 'package.json', 'next.js', 'config entry').

CheckSummary.description: Per-category issue counts for dead code analysis.

BaselineDeltas.description: Per-category delta comparison against a saved baseline. Shows current count, baseline count, and delta for each category.

total_delta.description: Net change in total issues vs baseline (positive = more issues).

per_category.description: Per-category breakdown of current, baseline, and delta counts.

current.description: Current issue count for this category.

baseline.description: Baseline issue count for this category.

MirroredDirectory.description: A pair of directories with high structural duplication, indicating systematic copy-paste of directory trees.

dir_a.description: First directory path (relative to project root).

dir_b.description: Second directory path (relative to project root).

shared_files.description: File names that appear in both directories with duplicated content.

total_lines.description: Total duplicated lines across all shared files.

VitalSignsCounts.description: Raw counts behind the vital signs percentages.

total_files.description: Total number of discovered source files.

total_exports.description: Total number of exports across all files.

Meta.description: Metric definitions and documentation links. Included when --explain is passed (always present in MCP responses). Helps AI agents and CI systems interpret metric values.

docs.description: URL to the documentation page for this command.

metrics.description: Per-metric definitions: name, description, range, interpretation.

description.description: What this metric measures and how it is computed.

interpretation.description: How to read the value (e.g., 'lower is better').

rules.description: Per-rule definitions for check command output.
